profile.name: Redas Baltrėnas
profile.title: Junior Backend Developer
profile.summary: Motivated software engineering student with hands-on experience in Java and .NET backend development. Proven track record of delivering real-world solutions — from updating POS systems to building an AI-powered image analysis web application. Combines strong technical skills with excellent communication experience. Eager to grow as a backend developer in a collaborative team environment.

highlights: Confirmed internship starting July 7, 2026 — Android mobile development using Kotlin
Verify passenger travel documents using the Timatic document check system
Board passengers and handle operational situations for AirBaltic, Lufthansa, Ryanair, GetJet, Heston
Proficient in aviation software: Altea, Iport, GoNow
Developed new Java features for the Sportland POS system in collaboration with SportDirect UK and StrongPoint
Maintained and updated the company website using .NET (C#)
Debugged and resolved existing code issues across Java and .NET codebases
Assisted customers with product selection and problem resolution
Operated cash register systems and handled transactions
Performed full interior and exterior vehicle cleaning using professional chemical products
Package sorting and conveyor belt management; truck loading and dispatching
Delivered food orders by car ensuring customer satisfaction and timely delivery

projects.name: AI-Powered Image Recommendation System
projects.description: Built a web app that accepts an uploaded image, sends it to an AI model, and returns personalised recommendations via a custom algorithm. Responsible for backend architecture in .NET (C#) and external AI API integration. Collaborated in a team with Git-based version control.
